entries.title: As AI companies race to go public, who else is along for the ride?
entries.description: Startups are trying to "ride that SpaceX IPO wave."

entries.title: As Anthropic suspends access to new models, India debates its AI future
entries.description: Tech leaders debate whether the Anthropic episode is a wake-up call for India’s AI ambitions.

entries.title: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing’s demand
entries.description: This is the most concrete step yet toward complying with a divestiture order Beijing issued roughly two months ago on national security grounds.

entries.title: KPMG pulls report on AI usage due to apparent hallucinations
entries.description: Once again, AI proves to be an unreliable source of information about AI.

entries.title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic model concerns before government crackdown
entries.description: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy may have been the source of security concerns that led Anthropic to cut off worldwide access to two models on Friday.

entries.title: OpenAI faces investigation from state attorneys general
entries.description: It's not clear which states are involved, but they're asking about everything from OpenAI's ad policies to its handling of health data.

entries.title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
entries.description: Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money back.

entries.title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI

entries.title: Sundar Pichai faces boos, walkout at Stanford graduation ceremony over Google’s Israel, ICE ties
entries.description: AI is once again at the heart of a college graduation protest — this time for the technology's use in Google's defense contracts.

entries.title: The US government’s Anthropic models ban was never about an AI jailbreak

entries.title: Meta’s new ‘AI Mode’ on Facebook pulls from public info across its platforms
entries.description: Meta announced Monday that it's rolling out a wave of new AI features on Facebook, the latest sign of the company's effort to catch up in the AI race and keep users more engaged on the platform.

entries.title: SpaceX is public: Everything you need to know post-IPO

entries.title: Cybersecurity vets protest ‘dangerous’ US government ban on Anthropic’s most powerful models
entries.description: A group made up of dozens of cybersecurity experts urged the White House to remove export-control restrictions on Anthropic’s Fable and Mythos models, arguing that the order is going to limit the abil

entries.title: Salesforce acquires AI customer service platform Fin for $3.6B
entries.description: Salesforce says it wants to use Fin's team and technology to improve Agentforce, its existing enterprise platform that businesses can use to build custom AI agents that automate tasks.

entries.title: Sarvam becomes India’s newest AI unicorn with $234 million funding round led by HCLTech
entries.description: Indian IT services company HCLTech is investing $150 million in the Bengaluru startup.

entries.title: As AI agents become employees, NewCore emerges with $66M to give them identities
entries.description: NewCore argues the next challenge in enterprise security will be managing AI agents, not people.

entries.title: A satellite just learned to find things on its own — here’s what that means
entries.description: In April, for the first time ever, an Earth observation satellite found what it was looking for, all on its own.

entries.title: The AI layoff wave is becoming a powder keg
entries.description: At the very moment that tens of thousands of workers are being shown the door, a small cohort of AI insiders is becoming wealthy on a scale that's hard to comprehend.
